description_long: This is a modern two-story house with a flat roof and a sleek, geometric design. The exterior features a mix of large glass panels, dark and light wall sections, and wooden deck areas. There is a rooftop terrace with green space, a spacious ground-level patio, and a swimming pool with adjacent lounge furniture. The house includes multiple balconies, a carport, and an external staircase leading to the upper level. Several large windows provide ample natural light and offer views from both floors. The property is landscaped with a few trees and is set on a rectangular plot with paved and wooden surfaces.
description: A modern two-story house with flat roofs, large glass windows, wooden decks, a rooftop terrace, and a swimming pool.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main facade, carport, central entry, and rooftop terrace with green space.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the external staircase, upper balcony, and the pool area with lounge furniture.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the expansive wooden deck, swimming pool, and large glass windows facing the backyard.
description_view_3: Opposite side view focusing on the pool, patio, and the rear glass facade with access to the outdoor area.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large picture windows and glass walls
attribute_entryway_design: Central entry with a flat overhang, wide glass door, and steps leading to a paved approach
